title: feat: add context_window to all text models
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Measuring the hive mind
gist.blurb: Added explicit context window limits to the API. Now you know exactly how much memory each model has before it forgets the beginning of your conversation.
gist.summary: Added `context_window` property to all text models in the registry, exposing token limits via the `/v1/models` endpoint.
gist.impact: Developers can programmatically retrieve context limits to prevent token overflow errors.
gist.visual_concept: The concept focuses on 'measurement' and 'capacity'. The bee mascot is acting as a tailor or archivist, measuring a very long scroll of code/text to show the specific length (context window). The setting is a cozy data-library.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot holding a measuring tape against a very long, unrolling scroll of code. A retro monitor nearby displays 'CTX: 128K' in lime green (#ecf874). Soft pastel library background with book-servers. Warm lighting, studious vibes like Stardew Valley museum. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
